checks: execution-state/v1 JSON fields clearly distinguish revision attempt invocation and Git subject
retry resume and Human rework produce the expected current state and preserved history
new commit after approval cannot reuse prior passing evidence or approval
existing done v4 Work Units remain readable without rewrite
Viewer contract is JSON-only and no legacy Human-facing report is generated
merge and cleanup remain separate Human decisions

content.method: Inspect the Work Unit diff and manager tests, run the recorded verification commands, compare execution-state history across retry, resume and rework fixtures, and confirm stale evidence refusal before choosing approve or rework.
content.approvalBoundary: Human approval completes the Work Unit only; merge, PR promotion and cleanup require separate explicit decisions.
